economic_notes: Nation has investments in Seven Lakes Oilfield Services LP, Pimee Well Servicing LP, Pimee Well Servicing Ltd., SL Smoke Eaters LP, and United Farmers of Alberta Equity. GBEs include Bison Auto Stop Ltd., Saddle Lake Building Supplies Ltd., and 1786228 Alberta Ltd. COVID-19 impacted service delivery and GBE operations. Provisional settlement agreed on 1986 oil and gas claim. Bison Auto Stop defaulted on loan payments subsequent to year end.
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence for investments in government business enterprises and long term investments accounted for by the modified equity method - same qualification existed in prior year. Two consolidated subsidiaries: 544526 Alberta Ltd. and Saddle Lake Wah-Koh-To-Win Society. Three GBEs: Bison Auto Stop Ltd., Saddle Lake Building Supplies Ltd., 1786228 Alberta Ltd. Bison Auto Stop defaulted on loan payments subsequent to year end; Nation paid $143,709 on its behalf. Provisional settlement on 1986 oil and gas claim contingent on factors expected by October 2022. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. Annual debt service calculated as repayment of long term debt $523,101 plus repayment of capital lease $91,768 = $614,869. Total government transfers estimated as ISC $75,839,468 + ISC Health $14,805,412 + Province of Alberta $5,164,865 + CMHC $533,309 + YESS $439,307 + ISETP $3,104,059 + FNDF $1,432,890 - net deferred revenue adjustment excluded as contributions carried forward are netted in revenue presentation; figure used is sum of identified government sources before deferred revenue netting.
